comment: tactical-violent bot band for --sim 5000 --policy tactical. RE-BASELINED in batch 13 (the mercy-economy ride-alongs). Violence remains the LOSING reliable strategy, now more doomed than ever: batch 13's goblin awe/punish made combat riskier (a planted or cornered fighter eats goblin punish hits), dropping competent violence from batch 12's 43.7% to 33.5% (pre-tune) / 33.9% (post-tune, goblin awe_threshold 2). The flip's whole point: the diplomat (51.0%) wins well ABOVE the fighter (33.9%). Measured @ awe_threshold=2: wins 1695/5000 (33.9%), deaths_combat ~2757, deaths_dark 548, stuck 0, kills heavy. Note: violence being doomed at ~34% is on-theme (the arc's 'violence is intuitive but doomed') — the goblin mechanic was NOT weakened to lift this number; the flip and the goblin awe design take precedence. Band brackets the measured value with regression headroom. Final batch-13 [TUNE] values documented in tests/tactical-pacifist-band.json's comment. Calibrated for 5000 seeds.
